title: acosta citricolor
intro: Acosta citricolor, also known as the Golden Acosta, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, known for its bright yellow flowers and citrus-like fragrance. The medicinal properties of the Acosta citricolor plant include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including skin infections and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
